productDisplayName: Puma Men Striped  Polo Red Tshirt
description: Composition Red, grey and blue striped polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar, short sleeves with buttoned chest placket, vented hem and embroidered brand logo on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cold water Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Subtle and stylish, this striped polo neck t-shirt from puma speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The embroidered brand logo on the left chest enhances your fashion statement, while the soft cotton fabric gives you exemplary comfort and the vented hem offers a comfortable Fit. Team this with jeans and lifestyle sportswear for that cool, casual look. Model statistics Model is a size M of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18”
